Inside pages are made of high-grade coated paper, not easily soiled

A Unique Keepsake: More than just a happy 18 years old birthday sign in card book, this beautifully designed piece doubles as a display-worthy memento, perfect for framing after the celebrations, capturing your special moments beautifully

Spark Conversations: With its retro-inspired design and fun facts, this born in 2008 birthday signature poster card gift is guaranteed to get your guests chatting and reminiscing about the good old days, making a perfect gift and decoration choice for your special event

Perfect Gift: Whether it’s for your son, daughter, a 18-year-old boy or girl or friend, this funny 18th birthday guestbook gift is a wonderfully personal way to mark their 18th birthday in retro style
